message:
perf(hook): add in-memory cache for TimingHistory (bd-3jsw)

Replace load-from-disk on every call with a process-global
OnceLock<RwLock<TimingHistory>> cache:

- First access lazily loads from disk, subsequent reads are zero I/O
- estimate_timing_for_build reads from cache (hot path optimization)
- record_build_timing updates cache then write-through to disk
- Process restart gracefully reloads from persisted file

Renamed load() -> load_from_disk() and save() -> save_to_disk()
to clarify intent now that the primary interface is the cache.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
